message.content:
{
  "decision": "Use BenchmarkContext as immutable configuration container with Repository, Model, and Constraints; score computed as mean of finite values (non-finite → 0).",
  "constraints": [
    "One heavy model server running at a time",
    "Fixed model paths",
    "Memory-safe Docker harness",
    "Reproducible logs",
    "Watchdog timeouts enforced"
  ],
  "open_risks": [
    "Model server overload if concurrency not strictly controlled",
    "Docker resource leaks if watchdog fails",
    "Non-finite values masking data quality issues (treated as 0)",
    "Constraints format unvalidated — risk of parsing errors"
  ],
  "next_steps": [
    "Implement Docker orchestration with per-experiment resource limits",
    "Add validation for Constraints strings (e.g., non-empty, valid syntax)",
    "Log raw values alongside scores for debugging non-finite drops",
    "Integrate watchdog timeout alerts into monitoring pipeline",
    "Design experiment queue system to enforce single-model-server constraint"
  ]
}
